installCommand: echo 'no install — Quarto downloads at build time'
buildCommand: curl -fsSL -o quarto.tar.gz https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/releases/download/v1.7.34/quarto-1.7.34-linux-amd64.tar.gz && tar -xzf quarto.tar.gz && export PATH="$PWD/quarto-1.7.34/bin:$PATH" && quarto --version && quarto render
